title: > Project = vessel / output / expression
content:
> Project = vessel / output / expression

---

### II. LOGIC CLASSIFICATION SYSTEM: REALITY vs DREAM

Each project or tool will be tagged with a *dominant logic mode*, which informs tone, structure, and method:

| Project | Mode | Notes |
|---------|------|-------|
| `::Q_v33R` | **Reality Logic** | Memoir, interviews, identity & community |
| `::GR1ND3R` | **Dream Logic** | Dread, unreliable memory, narrative collapse |
| `::MET4` | **Hybrid** | Structured myth, speculative theology |
| `::FLOAT1NG.P01NTS` | **Surreal** | Visual grammar, fragmented poetics |
| `::ETCETER4` | **Reality-inflected, dream-bent** | Lyric truth, audio collage |
| `::DR34M.L0G1K` | **Dream** | Symbolic AI, subconscious system UI |
| `::KONS0L` | **Reality** | Citation, analysis, archival order |

Tagging projects this way allows:
